title: PersonaBundle
description: A persona expressed as a Boolean expression over AudienceTag identifiers, preserving human legibility while keeping the targeting system bound to stable atomic tags rather than brittle caricatures.

id.description: Stable URN identifier for this persona bundle.

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the contract this document conforms to.

tagExpression.description: Boolean expression over AudienceTag ids/families using AND/OR/NOT and set membership, e.g. "IDENTITY_ROLE in {developer, engineer} AND INTENT_STAGE in {implementing, evaluating}".
